title: Community Batteries for Household Solar Program
source_title: Community Batteries for Household Solar Program
why_selected: Recent national audit with enough operational detail to separate apparent progress from the deeper bottlenecks in evaluation design, coordination, and value-for-money controls.
selection_notes: Useful benchmark item because the obvious story is 'program largely effective', but the real bottlenecks sit in evaluation design, cross-entity coordination, and cost/value discipline.
